parameters: Takashi said he's busy today too, so he's asking me to wait for him…？
Something fishy…I'm sure he's hiding something…
Today I'm going to find him and expose whatever he's hiding…！
※Investigating specific locations will progress the event.
I've told them I'm taking a break today, so I don't have to go.
The infirmary is unpopular. Takashi probably isn't here.
If I go into the girls' toilet now, I'm sure I'll lose something…I feel it.
I'll take a look while I'm doing my business…
For some reason, I ended up in front of the Kyudo club...
Takashi！ What are you doing here...?！
No... well... w-what's going on... You're here too, why...?
I was looking for you！ Every day, you make me wait...！
Sorry... Today's already over, so let's go home, okay?
No, today I'm not going home until you tell me everything you're hiding.
You just came out of the Kyudo club, right...？
Recently, you said you had something going on, are you doing something with the Kyudo club？
I-I get it... can't hide it anymore... I'll tell you honestly...
Shh！ Hey... someone else might hear you...！
How can you be dating someone like that！？
Hey... you had a clash with the Photography Club girl, didn't you？
I left early that day, but,
I felt bad for you, so I came back to school after a bit.
A-and... I saw Ayabe-senpai in the Kyudo Club room...
After you and the Photography Club girl left, I went to Ayabe-senpai's place.
S-so, why are you dating her?
Well... it was love at first sight, you know...
I kept talking to Ayabe-senpai every day.
Seriously... I'm surprised she didn't hate you...
It turned out... you're the first person to talk to her that persistently.
She said that, and started talking to me！
You remember that time we were talking with Ayabe-senpai at the stairwell entrance, right？
The reason I was making you wait that day was because I was confessing to Ayabe-senpai.
No way...(Ayabe-senpai is beautiful, but she has no taste in men...)
From now on, I'll stop by the archery club after school before heading home,
...I see. You've got a girlfriend too, huh?
Someone was talking about a 'no-girlfriend alliance' just a while ago.
N-never mind, it's fine...you should get a girlfriend too.
Tch, fine. If that's how it is, I'll get a girlfriend too.
Takashi...ended up choosing a girl over friendship, huh...
What a coincidence running into you here again.
Wha！？ Wh, why do you know that…
I just heard it from Takashi…You've been dating recently, I see…
A, well…thanks…but you're not looking too happy about it.
Well…I just had a bit of a fight with Takashi about that…
Is that so…if it's going to ruin your relationship,
shouldn't I just not be around…？
Eh…no！ Th, that's not what I mean, okay?！
This is a matter of male friendship！
Male friendship, huh…there's something about it that girls just can't understand…
W, well…it's mostly just a bunch of nonsense, though.
But, a fight, huh…I wish I could do something to help…
Well…there's probably not much I can do, though.
Please give me your contact information！
Uh, no... I just said I started dating Takashi-kun,
Please give me your contact information！
W-Well... Can you tell me your contact information, Ayabe-senpai？
Yes, I plan to act as usual with Takashi, but...
I want to know what he's thinking, so
If I could hear it from you, Ayabe-senpai, it would be helpful...
I see... If you feel that way, I'll give you my contact information.
Fufu, I hope you two can make up properly.
So, I'll head back to the archery club.
Alright… I've got Ayabe-senpai's contact info…！
Today was eventful… Anyway, my plan starts from today…
First, I'll apologize to Takashi via email to prepare.
If I can make him let his guard down…
Alright. Takashi is on board now. Next is… Ayabe-senpai.
Can I come watch your club activities next time？
Can I come watch your club activities next time？
I bought three bottles of water.
Hey, you, do you know that first-year student who's in the student council？
She gives off a 'My lady' vibe, you know?
Is that so… I guess she really is 'My lady' after all？
Hmm… I don't know？ Ayame-chan and I are in the same class, though…
She's always reading weird books, you know～
Um～ I think there were a lot of machines written about～
If you're going to go after that girl too, Senpai, you'd better hurry～！
But～ there's a rumor she's already got a boyfriend～！
Hey, you, do you know that first-year student who's in the student council？
She gives off a 'My lady' vibe, you know?
Is that so… I guess she really is 'My lady' after all？
Hmm… I don't know？ Ayame-chan and I are in the same class, though…
She's always reading weird books, you know～
Um～ I think there were a lot of machines written about～
If you're going to go after that girl too, Senpai, you'd better hurry～！
But～ there's a rumor she's already got a boyfriend～！
If it's a restless male student...
Now that you mention it, she was being followed by a weird kid recently...
I think she might be near the archery club again today？
Lately, I've been walking down the hallway lost in thought.
The hallway outside our classroom feels like home, it's soothing.
Ah, I left something on my desk in the classroom...
I don't really meet third-years that often, though...
Someone said they saw Ayabe-senpai at the entrance.
Speaking of which, have you heard the rumor that Ayabe-senpai got a boyfriend recently？
Apparently, her boyfriend is in class 2-B！
The budget documents for the club are a pain...
I need to take them to the student council room...
You're from the computer club, right？
One of your members was looking for you just now.
I wonder what to do about club activities today...
Maybe I'll slack off in the classroom...
When I'm in class, I end up fiddling with my phone...
The blonde girl from the computer club, her appearance and her club activity don't quite match, right?
When I'm in class, I end up fiddling with my phone...
The Photography Club member can't use the computer properly,
and just went running off to the Photography Club room making a big fuss.
After school, I'm looking forward to the entrance hall～
That reminds me, I saw Suzumoto-san heading to class 2-B with a gloomy face,
If it's a restless male student...
Now that you mention it, she was being followed by a weird kid recently...
I think she might be near the archery club again today？
